title: Fat Loss – Eggetarian
plateMethod: Fill half your plate with non-starchy vegetables, one-quarter with protein (eggs, legumes, tofu, paneer, Greek yogurt), and one-quarter with whole grains. Use small amounts of healthy fats (nuts, olive oil, avocado).
hydration: Aim for 2–2.5 L of water per day. Drink a glass before meals to help with fullness.
sampleMeals: Breakfast: Oatmeal with berries and nuts; or eggs with spinach and whole-grain toast.
Lunch: Large salad with chickpeas and quinoa; or dal with brown rice and vegetables.
Dinner: Stir-fried tofu or paneer with vegetables and a small portion of brown rice.
Snacks: Greek yogurt, fruit, vegetable sticks with hummus, or a small handful of nuts.
disclaimer: General guidance only; consult a healthcare or nutrition professional for personalized advice.
